instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `with-temp-file` that binds a variable to a temporary file path, executes the body, and deletes the file when finished (even on non-local exit). Evaluate the path expression once.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET* ((#:G1 "/tmp/foo.txt") (F #:G1))
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (WRITE-STUFF F))
              (WHEN (PROBE-FILE #:G1) (DELETE-FILE #:G1))))
ACTUAL:   (LET* ((#:G112 "/tmp/foo.txt") (F #:G112))
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (WRITE-STUFF F))
              (WHEN (PROBE-FILE #:G112) (DELETE-FILE #:G112))))

--- stderr ---
